a: Facebook Marketplace (Free listings, fees for shipping)
eBay (Insertion fees after 250 listings, final value fee)
Poshmark ($2.95 fee for items under $15, 20% fee for items over $15)
Mercari (10% commission fee, 3% payment processing fee)
OfferUp (Free listings, fees for exceeding monthly limits and shipping)
Etsy ($0.20 listing fee per item, 6.5% transaction fee)
Amazon Seller Central (Individual or Professional plans, referral & fulfillment fees)
Gumtree (Mostly free, fees for certain ads or business listings)
Shopify (Monthly subscription fee, additional costs for apps and themes)
